description: Physical-device-to-asset binding record. Connects a Device feature (sensor / actuator / camera / charger / etc.) to the PhysicalAsset / Building / BuildingFloor it monitors or actuates. Append-only TID-keyed; revisions = new record with `supersededByUri`. Per maps CLAUDE.md §Digital Twin + ADR-2605231400.

deviceUri.description: AT URI of the Device feature (label=Sensor / Camera / EvCharger / etc.).

assetUri.description: AT URI of the PhysicalAsset / Building / BuildingFloor / Station / etc. this device serves.

unboundAt.description: When set, the binding is no longer in effect. Caller publishes a new record to supersede rather than mutating; this field is for soft-delete on the prior record only.

operatorDid.description: DID of the entity that installed / configured the binding.
